---
title: "`r params$year` Risk Policy Report for `r params$stock`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output: pdf_document
params: # NA because they will be replaced by the shiny app parameters
    year: NA
    stock: NA 
    fmp: NA 
    matrix_tbl: NA
    scores: NA
    zscore: NA
    RecProb: NA
    zplot: NA
    rationale: NA
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# set echo in all code chunks so they are not included in the output file
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE) 
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
library(flextable)
```


```{r matrix-ft}
params$matrix_tbl |> 
    flextable() |> 
    merge_v() |> 
    border_inner() |> 
    width(width = c(1.5, 2.0, 3.5)) |> 
    align(j = 3, align = "justify")
```

\newpage 

## Scores and Weights 

```{r scores}
params$scores |> tab_options(table.width = pct(80), latex.tbl.pos = "ht") |> 
```

The calculated z-score is **`r params$zscore`**\
\
The recommended probability is **`r params$RecProb`**\  



## Recommended Probability Plot

```{r zplot}
params$zplot
```


## SSC Rationale 

`r if (params$rationale != ""){params$rationale} else {"No changes or additional rationale was provided."}`
